title: Salty Fluffy Australian Apricot Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and chewy dish featuring apricots and a touch of fermentation for a unique solo dinner option, suitable for those with dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Fermented foods (optional)
ingredients.amount: a few cubes of kefir or kombucha
ingredients.notes: For added flavor and dietary benefits.

instructions: Wash the apricots thoroughly and remove any pits. If using fermented foods, crush them into small pieces.
Mince the garlic finely to enhance its flavor in the dish.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add oil. Once hot, add crushed fermented foods if using.
Add minced garlic to the pan and stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the apricots to the pan with a bit of salt and pepper to taste. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Continue to stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes or until the apricots are slightly softened and golden brown in color.
Remove from heat immediately to avoid overcooking, which could lead to a mushy texture.
